corrections_detail: Rule 1 (gene therapy): Prior assumption of a standalone safety pharmacology section was incorrect. FDA guidance embeds safety pharmacology within toxicology study design (Section III.B.5), not as a separate requirement.
Rule 2 (vaccines): WHO vaccine guidelines contain no safety pharmacology section at all. Safety addressed through Section 4 toxicity assessment framework only.
confirmed_without_correction: Rule 3 (CTD placement): Module 4, section 4.2.1.3 confirmed directly from M4S(R2) document page 12.
Rule 4 (S9 anticancer): Section 2.2 text confirmed — endpoints incorporated into general tox studies; standalone studies not called for.
